title: OpenCode v1.17.9 Changelog
description: Latest CLI agent updates: agent step limits, MCP schema fixes, GLM-5.2 thinking modes, Snowflake Cortex OAuth, background subagents, and prompt caching fixes for terminal coding workflows.

title: AI Coding Tools Pricing: The June 2026 Reality Check
description: Verified June 20 pricing for Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and Devin. Critical June 22 Fable 5 API-only shift, Mastra npm supply-chain attack, and Copilot credit changes affecting agent workflows.

title: How to Build a Local AI Agent (2026): Ollama + Tools
description: 16-min guide to fully offline local agents using Ollama plus tool-calling models like Qwen3 and Llama 3.1. Compares LangGraph, CrewAI, and plain-Python loops with real VRAM and token benchmarks.

title: AI Intelligence Briefing — June 20, 2026
description: Anthropic pauses Claude Agent SDK token billing after 15-30x cost blowback for agent loops. MosaicLeaks benchmark exposes deep research agent data leaks. Cornell study shows Reddit UGC trivially poisons AI search.

title: Weekend Dispatch — June 20, 2026: Three Forces Run Your AI. None Is the Model.
description: Why employer data harvesting, open-weight infrastructure barriers, and government procurement power—not model choice alone—control AI outcomes. Cites MiniMax M3 SWE-bench performance and Zhipu GLM-5.2 MIT release.
